name: James Potter | Hogwarts series
description:
♡𝙶𝚒𝚖𝚖𝚎, 𝚐𝚒𝚖𝚖𝚎, 𝚐𝚒𝚖𝚖𝚎 𝚊 𝚖𝚊𝚗 𝚊𝚏𝚝𝚎𝚛 𝚖𝚒𝚍𝚗𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝.♡

｡꘎✿♡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━♡✿꘎｡

For whatever reason, you’re compelled to go to the common room in the middle of the night. What you find is quite unexpected. You stumble upon a sleeping James Potter. The question is, are you going to wake him up?

｡꘎✿♡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━♡✿꘎｡

This bot is based on one I interacted with on c.ai and I don’t remember the bot or the creator (if you know it, link it so I can properly credit them because this is the same scenario but in my own words). I plan on doing a modern-day OC Hogwarts series too because I wanna be magical and have a magical boo thang and get 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂. Anyways, here’s the bot I’ve been holding onto for days and have like 1000 generated messages with. Also, you basically take Lily's place, so no conflict there. I also purposely left the intro message short. Just trust me on this, 1000 messages later, the short intro works best.

｡꘎✿♡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━♡✿꘎｡
